## DAY 2026-03-21 (TW=1307.98, -12) 774274=Misgav Am (obscure border kibbutz, -11.58). War-specific obscure pattern continues.
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'120805','581783','554489','718848','740952'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:92])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:130])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
